Container.Name: Sure-AIO
Container.Overview: Sure: The personal finance app for everyone. Community fork of Maybe Finance. This AIO version bundles the Rails web server and Sidekiq worker into a single container using s6-overlay.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Web interface port.

Config.Name: App URL
Config.Description: TIER 1: The full URL where your instance is hosted (e.g., https://sure.yourdomain.com).

Config.Name: Secret Key Base
Config.Description: TIER 1: Secret key for encryption. Generate a unique 128-char hex string (e.g., with 'openssl rand -hex 64').

Config.Name: Default Currency
Config.Description: TIER 1: Default currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

Config.Name: Onboarding State
Config.Description: TIER 1: Controls user registration flow (open, closed, invite_only).

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: TIER 1: Your local timezone. Example: America/Denver.

Config.Name: Postgres Host
Config.Description: TIER 2: Standard Mode - Host for postgres-shared.

Config.Name: Postgres Port
Config.Description: TIER 2: Standard Mode - Port for postgres-shared.

Config.Name: Postgres User
Config.Description: TIER 2: Standard Mode - PostgreSQL username.

Config.Name: Postgres Password
Config.Description: TIER 2: Standard Mode - PostgreSQL password.

Config.Name: Redis URL
Config.Description: TIER 2: Standard Mode - Full Redis connection string (e.g., redis://redis-shared:6379/1).

Config.Name: Storage Path
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Persistent path for application data.

Config.Name: OpenAI Token
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Optional token for AI insights.

Config.Name: Twelve Data API Key
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - API key for market data (twelvedata.com).

Config.Name: Exchange Rate Provider
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Data provider (twelve_data or yahoo_finance).

Config.Name: SMTP Address
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - SMTP server address.

Config.Name: SMTP Port
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - SMTP server port.

Config.Name: SMTP Username
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - SMTP username.

Config.Name: SMTP Password
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - SMTP password.

Config.Name: Email Sender
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Email address to send from.

Config.Name: Brandfetch Client ID
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Optional for merchant logos.

Config.Name: Product Name
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Customize product branding name.

Config.Name: Brand Name
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Customize brand name.

Config.Name: PostHog Key
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Optional analytics key.

Config.Name: PostHog Host
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Optional analytics host.

Config.Name: Active Record Primary Key
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Encryption key (auto-generated if blank).

Config.Name: Active Record Deterministic Key
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Deterministic key (auto-generated if blank).

Config.Name: Active Record Key Salt
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Key salt (auto-generated if blank).

Config.Name: Rails Log Level
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Logging verbosity (debug, info, warn, error).

Config.Name: Rails Serve Static
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Required for AIO mode server static assets.

Config.Name: Rails Environment
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Deployment environment.

Config.Name: Self Hosted Mode
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Must be true for community fork self-hosting.
